query:
UPDATE staff_users su
SET su.managerId = su.invitedBy
WHERE su.role = 'corretor'
  AND su.invitedBy IS NOT NULL
  AND su.managerId IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM staff_users mgr
    WHERE mgr.id = su.invitedBy
    AND mgr.role = 'gerente'
  )

  AND su.managerId IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM staff_users mgr
    WHERE mgr.id = su.invitedBy
    AND mgr.role = 'gerente'
  )
